entities.name: ICMP 85410
entities.description: An inbred restorer line of pearl millet, also known as PI597490

entities.name: ICMH85410
entities.description: A single-cross grain hybrid of pearl millet

entities.name: DWARF
entities.description: A characteristic of reduced height in the plant

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infection by Sclerospora graminicola

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: RECURRENT SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to increase the frequency of desirable alleles

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of a parent to transmit favorable traits to its offspring

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, measured as 1141-1692 kg/ha

entities.name: FERTILITY RESTORER
entities.description: The ability to restore fertility in cytoplasmic male sterile lines

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where pollen production is absent due to cytoplasmic factors

entities.name: A1 SYSTEM
entities.description: A specific system of cytoplasmic male sterility

entities.name: A4 SYSTEM
entities.description: A specific system of cytoplasmic male sterility

entities.name: D2D2
entities.description: A genetic marker associated with the dwarf trait
